name: skill-governance
description: Reusable skill authoring, design review, lifecycle, recurrence, and learning governance skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create, review, promote, demote, and learn from skills with evidence.
interface.longDescription: Packages skill-governance workflows for authoring reusable skills, reviewing skill design, classifying promotion or rollback, capturing artifact improvements, and turning user corrections into recurrence patches.
defaultPrompt: Review whether this skill should be kept.
Create a skill from this repeated workflow.
Turn this correction into a recurrence patch.
